name: Lucy Bedroque
description: '''Jeremiah Mark''' (born May 7, 2006), known professionally as  '''Lucy Bedroque''' (formerly '''Lostrushi''', stylized in [[lowercase]]), is an American rapper, singer and record producer based in [[Los Angeles]]. In 2025, they{{Efn|Bedroque uses they/he pronouns.<ref name="genderid">{{Cite tweet |number=1916688333859852594 |user=bedroque00 |title=they/he pronouns just in case that wasnt established before |first=|last=|author=Lucy Bedroque |date=2025-04-27 |access-date=2025-09-29}}</ref> This article uses ''[[Singular they|they/them]]'' for consistency.}} released their debut mixtape ''[[Unmusique]]''.
